LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT MICHAEL NIELSEN'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES ON APPEAL IS GRANTED IN FULL. RESPONDENT IS ENTITLED TO HIS APPELLATE FEES AND THE FEES FOR BRINGING THIS MOTION PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE SECTION 3426.4 BECAUSE PETITIONER COMMENCED ITS UTSA ACTION IN BAD FAITH. THERE IS NO BASIS TO APPORTION THE APPELLATE FEES, ESPECIALLY GIVEN THAT THE FINDER OF FACT CONCLUDED THAT THE CLAIMS WERE SO INTERRELATED THAT APPORTIONMENT WAS NOT FEASIBLE. THE ARBITRATORS AND TRIAL COURT NEVER MADE ANY PROSPECTIVE RULINGS REGARDING APPELLATE FEES AND PETITIONER READS TOO MUCH INTO THE ARBITRATION AWARD AND ORDER CONFIRMING THE AWARD. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Costs And Opposition To Motion For Attorney Fees On Appeal
Off Calendar Feb-14-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
James A. Hughes, Esq., of Sullwold & Hughes, Tel. 415.263.1850, appearing for Defendant and opposing party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER WELLS FARGO ADVISORS, LLC, SUCCESSOR TO WACHOVIA SECURITIES, LLC and A.G. EDWARDS & SON INC.'s Motion To Strike Costs And Opposition To Motion For Attorney Fees On Appeal is Denied. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported

Mtn For Atty'S Fees On Appeal
Off Calendar Feb-14-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
James A. Hughes, Esq., of Sullwold & Hughes, Tel. 415.263.1850, specially appearing for Defendant and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT MICHAEL NIELSEN's Motion For Attorney's Fees On Appeal is Granted in full. Respondent is entitled to his appellate fees and the fees for bringing this motion pursuant to Civil Code section 3426.4 because petitioner commenced its UTSA action in bad faith. There is no basis to apportion the appellate fees, especially given that the finder of fact concluded that the claims were so interrelated that apportionment was not feasible. The arbitrators and trial court never made any prospective rulings regarding appellate fees and Petitioner reads too much into the arbitration award and order confirming the award. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported

MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Feb-14-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
James A. Hughes, Esq., of Sullwold & Hughes, Tel. 415.263.1850, appearing for Defendant and moving party.

No other Appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT STIFEL, NICOLAUS & CO., INC.'s MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES ON APPEAL is Granted in full. Respondent is entitled to its appellate fees and the fees for bringing this motion pursuant to Civil Code section 3426.4 because petitioner commenced its UTSA action in bad faith. There is no basis to apportion the appellate fees, especially given that the finder of fact concluded that the claims were so interrelated that apportionment was not feasible. The arbitrators and trial court never made any prospective rulings regarding appellate fees and Petitioner reads too much into the arbitration award and order confirming the award. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported
